q.en: What was Marie Curie's birth name?
q.zh: 玛丽·居里的出生名字是什么？

options.zh: 玛丽亚·斯克沃多夫斯卡（Maria Sklodowska）

options.en: Bronya Sklodowska according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 布朗妮娅·斯克沃多夫斯卡（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: She was born Maria Sklodowska on November 7, 1867, in Warsaw, Poland, and was called Manya as a child.
explain.zh: 她于1867年11月7日出生于波兰华沙，原名玛丽亚·斯克沃多夫斯卡，童年昵称曼娅。

q.en: In what year did Marie earn her master's degree in physics, and how did she rank?
q.zh: 玛丽在哪一年获得物理学硕士学位，成绩如何？

explain.en: Two years after enrolling at the Sorbonne, she graduated first in her class with a master's degree in physics in 1893.
explain.zh: 进入索邦大学两年后，她于1893年以物理学硕士学位全班第一毕业。

q.en: Which two elements did Marie and Pierre Curie discover?
q.zh: 玛丽和皮埃尔·居里发现了哪两种元素？

options.en: Uranium and thorium according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 铀和钍（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: In 1898 they discovered polonium (named for her homeland) and radium (from the Latin word for 'ray').
explain.zh: 1898年他们发现了钋（以其祖国命名）和镭（源自拉丁语'射线'）。

q.en: How many Nobel Prizes did Marie Curie win, and in which fields?
q.zh: 玛丽·居里获得了几项诺贝尔奖，分别属于哪些领域？

options.en: Three, all in Chemistry according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 三项，均为化学（按书中另一种说法）
两项——1903年物理学与1911年化学

explain.en: She won the 1903 Nobel Prize in Physics and the 1911 Nobel Prize in Chemistry.
explain.zh: 她获得了1903年诺贝尔物理学奖和1911年诺贝尔化学奖。

q.en: What does the word 'radioactivity,' coined by Marie Curie, refer to?
q.zh: 玛丽·居里创造的'radioactivity'（放射性）一词指的是什么？

options.en: The emission of rays from an atom's nucleus
The study of stars according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 对恒星的研究（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: She coined 'radioactivity' to refer to the emission of rays from an atom's nucleus, or center.
explain.zh: 她创造'放射性'一词，指原子核对射线的发射。

q.en: What is an electrometer, used in Marie's research?
q.zh: 玛丽的研究中使用的'electrometer'（静电计）是什么？

options.en: A device to detect and measure electric currents
options.zh: 检测和测量电流差异的仪器

options.en: A type of X-ray machine according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一种X光机（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: An electrometer is a device used to detect and measure differences in electric currents; Marie used it to study uranium rays.
explain.zh: 静电计是检测和测量电流差异的仪器；玛丽用它研究铀射线。

q.en: How did Marie Curie put her science to use during World War I?
q.zh: 第一次世界大战期间，玛丽·居里如何运用她的科学成果？

options.en: She worked as a nurse with no equipment according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 她作为护士工作且没有任何设备（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: She built tanks for the army
She developed portable X-ray machines to treat wounded soldiers
options.zh: 她研制了便携式X光机救治伤员

explain.en: She set up twenty mobile X-ray stations and two hundred fixed stations using portable X-ray machines for wounded soldiers.
explain.zh: 她建立了20个移动X光站和200个固定站，用便携式X光机救治伤员。

q.en: What makes Marie Curie unique among all Nobel Prize winners?
q.zh: 玛丽·居里在所有诺贝尔奖获得者中为何独一无二？

options.en: She is the only person awarded Nobel Prizes in two different scientific fields
options.zh: 她是唯一一位在两个不同科学领域获诺贝尔奖的人

options.en: She won three prizes in one year according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 她在同一年获得三项奖（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: She was the first man to win

explain.en: To this day she is the only person awarded Nobel Prizes in two different areas of science.
explain.zh: 至今她仍是唯一一位在两个不同科学领域获诺贝尔奖的人。

q.en: What was the author's main purpose in writing this book?
q.zh: 作者写这本书的主要目的是什么？

options.en: To argue against women in science
To show who Marie Curie was and how her discoveries changed science
options.zh: 展示玛丽·居里是谁以及她的发现如何改变了科学

options.en: To entertain with a fictional story according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 用一个虚构故事娱乐读者（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The Focus Question asks who Marie Curie was and how she changed the world of science.
explain.zh: 书中的核心问题是：玛丽·居里是谁，她如何改变了科学世界。

q.en: Which character trait does the author most emphasize as key to Marie's success?
q.zh: 作者最强调哪种品格是玛丽成功的关键？

options.en: Wealth according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 财富（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book closes with her quote stressing perseverance and confidence in oneself as essential to achievement.
explain.zh: 本书以她的引文结尾，强调毅力与自信是取得成就的关键。

prompt.en: Marie Curie faced many obstacles as a woman in science. What obstacles did she face, and what character trait helped her overcome them?
prompt.zh: 玛丽·居里作为科学界的女性面临了许多障碍。她遇到了哪些障碍，又是什么品格帮助她克服了它们？

en: Identify obstacles such as women being barred from universities or being overlooked for the Nobel Prize.
Name the trait the book highlights—perseverance and self-confidence.
Use a detail or quote from the book to support your answer.
zh: 指出障碍，例如女性被禁止上大学或被诺贝尔奖忽略。
点出书中强调的品格——毅力与自信。
用书中的细节或引文支持你的回答。
